scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --prefix Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --prefix Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major --prefix Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && git push origin --tags
